name: Double Chocolate Drop Cookies1
recipeIngredient: 1 3/4 cups All-purpose flour (or whole wheat flour)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 400 degrees.
2. In a large bowl, mix together the sugar, softened margarine, egg, melted chocolate, buttermilk, and vanilla.
3. Stir in the flour, baking soda, salt, chopped nuts (if using), and chocolate chips.
4. Drop the dough by rounded teaspoonfuls about 2 inches apart onto an ungreased cookie sheet.
5. Bake for 8 to 10 minutes or until the cookies have lost their indentation when touched.
6. Remove from the oven and allow to cool.
7. Frost with Chocolate Frosting.
- To make the frosting, melt the chocolate and margarine over low heat.
- Remove from heat and stir in water and powdered sugar until smooth.
If using self-rising flour, omit the baking soda and salt.
